zh.Dunterton, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文登特頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay於1311年之後出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Hugh Courtenay II8725歲，母親Agnes Saint John8724歲。他於1337年8月與Muriel De Moels在英國英格蘭戴文登特頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1356年在英國英格蘭戴文登特頓，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.Dunterton, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文登特頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay于1311年之后出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Hugh Courtenay II8725岁，母亲Agnes Saint John8724岁。他于1337年8月与Muriel De Moels在英国英格兰戴文登特頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1356年在英国英格兰戴文登特頓，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay was born after 1311, in Devon, England, his father, Hugh Courtenay II, was 8725 and his mother, Agnes Saint John, was 8724. He married Muriel De Moels in August 1337, in Dunterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1356, in Dunterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay est né après 1311, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Courtenay II, avait 8725 ans et sa mère, Agnes Saint John, avait 8724 ans. Il a épousé Muriel De Moels en août 1337, à Dunterton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1356, à Dunterton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay nach 1311 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Courtenay II 8725 und seine Mutter Agnes Saint John 8724. Er hat im August 1337 in Dunterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom Muriel De Moels geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1356 in Dunterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay è nato il dopo il 1311 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Hugh Courtenay II, aveva 8725 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Saint John, aveva 8724 anni. Lui sposato Muriel De Moels nel agosto 1337, nel Dunterton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1356, nel Dunterton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenayが1311年以後にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Hugh Courtenay IIは8725歳，母Agnes Saint Johnは8724歳であった。1337年8月にイギリスイギリスデボンダンテルトンでMuriel De Moelsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1356年にイギリスイギリスデボンダンテルトンで死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay(이)가 1311년 이후 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Courtenay II(은)는 8725세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Saint John(은)는 8724세였다. 그는 1337년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 던터턴에서 Muriel De Moels(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1356년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 던터턴에서 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

mn.Dunterton, Devon, England: Dunterton, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay nasceu após 1311, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Courtenay II, tinha 8725 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Saint John, tinha 8724 anos. Ele casou-se com Muriel De Moels em agosto de 1337, em Dunterton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1356, em Dunterton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay родился после 1311 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Courtenay II было 8725 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Saint John, 8724. Он женился на женщине по имени Muriel De Moels август 1337 г. в местности дунтиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1356 г. в местности дунтиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay nació después de 1311, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Courtenay II, tenía 8725 años y su mamá, Agnes Saint John, tenía 8724 años. Se casó con Muriel De Moels en agosto de 1337, en Dunterton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1356, en Dunterton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
